character.definition: to look at; to see, to peep; to look something stealthily, angry
forty bundles of rice plant, panicled millet, (same as 芽) sprout; shoot; bud
chemical element; Samarium (Sm); (same as 鋱) old translation of Terbium (Tb), (same as 釤) a sickle with a long handle, to swing a sickle to cut (grass or wheat)
to bale out water, to dip
to bury, to stop up; dirty, filthy
to decide, judge; a verdict, decision
a cage, a pen, a grating, bars, window; window frame
